VAL-STRESS-001.notes: Test `stress_alloc_fragmentation_linked_list` passed. Allocates many different sizes, frees in seeded random order, verifies allocator can still service requests without corruption.

VAL-STRESS-002.notes: Test `stress_alloc_slab_and_mixed` (Parts A+B) passed. Fills slab caches to capacity, verifies slab growth, frees everything and verifies clean state.

VAL-STRESS-003.notes: Test `stress_buddy_coalescing_all_merge_paths` passed (0.70s runtime). Exercises all buddy merge paths across every order level, verifies free counts return to baseline.

VAL-STRESS-004.notes: Test `stress_alloc_slab_and_mixed` (Parts C+D) passed. Interleaves slab, linked-list, and buddy allocations/frees, verifies no cross-allocator contamination and correct routing.

VAL-STRESS-005.notes: All 8 tests passed: stress_sched_ctx_borrow_return_concurrent, stress_sched_ctx_concurrent_bind_close_exit, stress_sched_ctx_exit_while_borrowing, stress_sched_ctx_interleaved_500_ops, stress_sched_ctx_many_threads_precise_refcount, stress_sched_ctx_mixed_operations_random, stress_sched_ctx_slot_reuse_after_concurrent, stress_sched_ctx_threads_exit_before_handle_close. Verifies ref_count reaches zero exactly when last thread exits.

fullSuiteVerification.notes: Full test suite (`cargo test -- --test-threads=1`) passed with 0 failures across all test files. All stress test files included in the full run.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. stress_alloc_fragmentation (2 tests), stress_buddy_coalescing (1 test), stress_sched_ctx_concurrent (8 tests) all green. Full test suite also verified green with 0 failures.
